title: TikTok Helps Choose What Books You Read
summary: Have you ever wanted to read a book because someone told you it was good? Many people now find books on TikTok, a social media app where people share short videos. On TikTok, there is a group called BookTok where people talk about books they love. They make videos that are fast and fun, and they share their feelings about stories. Because of this, a new list of the most popular books on BookTok has been made in the UK. This list uses sales numbers from bookstores and how many times a book is talked about on TikTok. The first list had all women writers. One writer, Chloe Walsh, had six books on the list. Some books from many years ago, like The Secret History from 1992, became popular again because of TikTok. Many books on the list are also going to be movies or TV shows. This shows that TikTok is changing how people find and like books.

background_read: TikTok is a popular app where people create and watch short videos. Many people use it to share their hobbies, like reading. BookTok is a community on TikTok where readers recommend books and share their thoughts. This has become very influential, and now there is a special list of the most popular books on BookTok. The list is updated every month and shows which books are being talked about the most.
Article_Structure: WHO: People who use TikTok and love books, especially young readers and influencers.
WHAT: A new official BookTok bestseller list has been launched in the UK.
WHERE: The list is based on UK sales data and TikTok hashtag analysis.
WHY: Because TikTok is changing how people discover and choose books, and the list formalizes that influence.

perspectives.description: They find books through TikTok recommendations and enjoy sharing their thoughts.
Authors like Chloe Walsh benefit from TikTok exposure, with books gaining popularity.
